headline: How The Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Story Is Shifting With Copper, Grasberg And Analyst Targets
summary: The latest update trims Freeport-McMoRan’s fair value estimate to US$67.40, compared with US$67.47 previously, a very small adjustment that still sits in the same broad price target zone. This shift lines up with an active research backdrop, where some firms are lifting targets into the mid to high US$60s and above, while others remain more cautious on valuation and risk. As you read on, you will see how these competing views and fresh data points shape the evolving analyst story around...
